message: ci: add lite very-hard nightly, timings, and sanitizers

files.patch:
@@ -7,6 +7,9 @@ on:
   pull_request:
     branches: [ main ]
   workflow_dispatch:
+  schedule:
+    - cron: "30 5 * * *"   # nightly lite very-hard subset + timings
+    - cron: "0 6 * * 0"    # weekly full very-hard + sanitizers
 
 jobs:
   test:
@@ -26,8 +29,17 @@ jobs:
       - name: Run cargo test (core + optional python features, skip lapack)
         run: |
           cargo test --features "numpy_support test_utils"
+      - name: Benchmarks with timings
+        run: |
+          cargo test --test benchmarks -- --nocapture | tee timings-benchmarks.log
+      - name: Upload benchmark timings
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: timings-benchmarks-${{ github.run_id }}
+          path: timings-benchmarks.log
 
-  very-hard:
+  very-hard-lite:
+    if: github.event_name == 'schedule' || github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch'
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     needs: test
     timeout-minutes: 30
@@ -43,11 +55,72 @@ jobs:
           key: ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
       - name: Install Rust (nightly for portable_simd)
         uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+      - name: Run very-hard lite subset
+        run: |
+          cargo test --test very_hard_lite -- --nocapture | tee timings-very-hard-lite.log
+      - name: Upload lite timings
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: timings-very-hard-lite-${{ github.run_id }}
+          path: timings-very-hard-lite.log
+
+  very-hard:
+    if: (github.event_name == 'schedule' && github.event.schedule == '0 6 * * 0') || github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch'
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: test
+    timeout-minutes: 60
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: |
+            ~/.cargo/registry
+            ~/.cargo/git
+            target
+          key: ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
+      - name: Install Rust (nightly for portable_simd)
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
       - name: Run ignored very-hard CMA-ES suite (GitHub compute only)
         env:
           RUST_BACKTRACE: 1
         run: |
-          cargo test --all-features --test hard_benchmarks -- --ignored --nocapture
+          cargo test --all-features --test hard_benchmarks -- --ignored --nocapture | tee timings-very-hard.log
+      - name: Upload very-hard timings
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: timings-very-hard-${{ github.run_id }}
+          path: timings-very-hard.log
+
+  miri:
+    if: (github.event_name == 'schedule' && github.event.schedule == '0 6 * * 0') || github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch'
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - name: Install Rust nightly + miri
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+      - run: rustup component add miri
+      - name: Run miri on lib tests (lite)
+        env:
+          MIRIFLAGS: "-Zmiri-symbolic-alignment-check"
+        run: |
+          cargo miri test --lib
+
+  asan:
+    if: (github.event_name == 'schedule' && github.event.schedule == '0 6 * * 0') || github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch'
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - name: Install Rust nightly
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+      - name: Install LLVM tools
+        run: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y llvm
+      - name: Run address sanitizer on lib tests
+        env:
+          RUSTFLAGS: "-Zsanitizer=address"
+          RUSTDOCFLAGS: "-Zsanitizer=address"
+          ASAN_OPTIONS: "detect_odr_violation=0"
+        run: |
+          cargo test -Zbuild-std --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu --lib
 
   demo:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest

@@ -195,7 +195,7 @@ uv run python examples/rich_tui_demo.py
 - Rust quick suite: `cargo test`
 - Extended hard benchmarks (20 classic functions): `cargo test --test hard_benchmarks` (takes ~90s)
 - Very-hard (ignored) suite (high-dim/fractal/ill-conditioned, +~20 cases): `cargo test --test hard_benchmarks -- --ignored`
-- CI runs the core suite on every push/PR and executes the ignored very-hard suite on GitHub Actions workers (job: `very-hard`) so heavy compute stays off your local machine; expect PR CI to take a few minutes longer because of that job and wheel matrix builds.
+- CI runs the core suite on every push/PR; a lite very-hard subset runs nightly on GH; the full ignored very-hard + sanitizers run weekly on GH; expect PR CI to take a few minutes because of timings capture and wheel matrix builds.
 - Python smoke (local wheel): `pytest tests/python_smoke.py`
 - CI: GitHub Actions builds wheels on nightly Rust; runs smoke tests; publishes to PyPI on tags when `PYPI_API_TOKEN` is set; PyPI smoke follows publish.
